item.title: 分支策略优化：沙箱-母语代理强化学习
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14171v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning has emerged as the dominant paradigm for training large language model (LLM) agents that interact with executable sandboxes.
